human_approval_required_for: applying a fix before the hypothesis is proven
skipping investigation phase to jump to a guess
phases: investigation — read the actual code, do not skim
pattern-recognition — look for similar bugs, prior fixes
hypothesis — falsifiable, one variable at a time, 3-strikes rule

boundaries.produces: systematic 4-phase debugging discipline for bugs and regressions
boundaries.does_not_produce: the bug fix itself (the workflow's execute phase does the implementation)
boundaries.does_not_handle: performance regressions that are not bugs (use a performance-focused workflow)
